source_intake_record.raw_question_text: A 1-m^3 rigid tank contains 100 kg R-410a at a temperature of 15\circ\text{C}. A valve on top of the tank is opened, and saturated vapor is throttled to ambient pressure, 100 kPa and flows to a collector system. During the process, the temperature inside the tank remains at 15\circ\text{C} by heat transfer from the 20\circ\text{C} ambient. The valve is closed when no more liquid remains inside. Calculate the total entropy generation in the process.
